message:
1. Run CPU intensive operation: exec_command("find . -maxdepth 4 -not -path '*/.*' | wc -l")
        2. Run GPU intensive operation: ollama_generate(model="qwen2.5-coder:7b", prompt="Write a complex 200-line CUDA kernel for parallel sorting for Agent 1.")
        3. Write a unique file: write_file(filePath="tmp/bench/agent-1.txt", content="Ultra Overdrive Proof from Agent 1")
        4. Document your hardware performance results in the shared swarm memory graph using 'store_memory' (type: swarm_discovery, name: "bench-result-1", observations: ["CPU load triggered", "GPU inference complete"]).
        5. Say DONE.
